title: Kwa Police operation leads to arrest, seizure of alcohol
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police confiscated some money and just over 60 litres of alcohol from an illegal liquor outlet in the Phelandaba informal settlement in 7de Laan on Saturday evening, 8 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police confiscated some money and just over 60 litres of alcohol from an illegal liquor outlet in the Phelandaba informal settlement in 7de Laan on Saturday evening, 8 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, the station’s spokesperson, said a 42-year-old man was found to be selling liquor without a licence and was arrested on the spot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police seized the money and alcohol, and the man is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court soon.","html":"The police seized the money and alcohol, and the man is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court soon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp went on to urge the public to sell and deal in liquor legally, by applying and going through the proper channels.","html":"Kapp went on to urge the public to sell and deal in liquor legally, by applying and going through the proper channels."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He urged the public to report outlets suspected of selling liquor illegally to the KwaNonqaba Police Station: Call 08600 10111 or the KwaNonqaba Community Service Centre on 044 605601.","html":"He urged the public to report outlets suspected of selling liquor illegally to the KwaNonqaba Police Station: Call 08600 10111 or the KwaNonqaba Community Service Centre on 044 605601."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Kwa Police operation leads to arrest, seizure of alcohol
